introSection: Outlaw Run is a wooden roller coaster located at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. The ride features three inversions: an overbanked turn and a double heartline roll, the most inversions on any wooden roller coaster, being tied with Wildfire, at Kolmården Wildlife Park. It was built by Rocky Mountain Construction and opened in 2013.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
A car from Outlaw Run was revealed at the 2012 IAAPA Expo.

Outlaw Run opened on March 15, 2013.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.

fullText:
Outlaw Run is a wooden roller coaster located at Silver Dollar City in Branson, Missouri, USA. The ride features three inversions: an overbanked turn and a double heartline roll, the most inversions on any wooden roller coaster, being tied with Wildfire, at Kolmården Wildlife Park. It was built by Rocky Mountain Construction and opened in 2013.

A car from Outlaw Run was revealed at the 2012 IAAPA Expo.

Outlaw Run opened on March 15, 2013.



2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train.
